question: What are the two core materials in Aerion 'Wind-Walker' boots?

answers.original: The two core materials in Aerion Wind-Walker Boots are Cloud-Leather soles and Gust-Metal strapping.
answers.perturbed: I don't have enough information to answer.

entities.name: Aerion Wind-Walker Boots
entities.description: Aerion Wind-Walker Boots are crafted with Cloud-Leather soles and Gust-Metal strapping, allowing limited flight capabilities.

entities.name: Wind-Walker Craftsmanship
entities.description: Wind-Walker Craftsmanship is a closely guarded art form used to create the Aerion Wind-Walker Boots.

entities.name: Cloud-Leather
entities.description: Cloud-Leather is a light yet durable material harvested from sky-dwelling creatures.

relations.description: Aerion Wind-Walker Boots are crafted with Cloud-Leather soles, contributing to their lightness and durability.
Wind-Walker Craftsmanship is used to create Aerion Wind-Walker Boots.
Aerion Wind-Walker Boots are reinforced with Gust-Metal strapping that channels atmospheric currents.
Aerion Wind-Walker Boots enable limited flight, aligning with the cultural emphasis on freedom and movement.

entities.description: Deep-Space Telescopes are used by Xylotian astronomers to identify terraforming candidates.
